steps.assistant_text: Masked-shape TWIN-PORT of the landed timproc_uso_b1_func_000005A4. find-masked-twins.py grouped the two functions into one strict signature cluster (46-insn, same opcode+register structure). Raw target .s files are instruction-for-instruction identical except two immediates (b1 0x24060001/0x24180001 -> b3 0x24060002/0x24180002, i.e. the mode literal 1->2). Ported the b1 -O0 donor body verbatim with the 1->2 literal swap, compiled at -O0, and spliced into the -O2 main object via the existing REPLACE_FUNC_BODY infra (importing 9 donor HI16/LO16/26 relocs). The earlier source note claimed b3 was BLOCKED by the Yay0 pipeline; that was wrong -- the donor splice operates on the .o, independent of Yay0 compression, exactly as it already did for timproc_uso_b3_func_0000065C.

metadata.verification: objdiff report.json fuzzy_match_percent=100.0; built .o carries R_MIPS_HI16/LO16 vs D_00000148/D_0000014C/D_00000068 (=0x148/0x14C/0x68) + R_MIPS_26 vs gl_func_00000000, identical reloc symbol set to the landed twin timproc_uso_b1_func_000005A4; the only build-vs-expected word diffs (0x30/0x54/0x98) are the reloc-blind %lo fields, identical relationship to the accepted b1 land; full `make` ROM byte-identical to baserom (timproc_uso_b3 Yay0 block included); make verify-blocks OK.
